prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年约第 59 名，近年排名在 47–59 之间波动，整体处于中上水平；2026 年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及校园安全管理（宿舍安检），无重大负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第 41 位，评价为「较热」，短视频平台关注度中等偏上，对报考热度有一定正向支撑；新闻传播学 A、工商管理 A、应用经济学 A-、中国语言文学 A-、生物学 A-、药学 A-，共 6 个 A- 及以上学科；其中新闻传播学、工商管理、应用经济学等与招生专业高度关联，对相关专业报考有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类对应热门专业大类（计算机类、电子信 息/通信、电气工程）2026 年社会热度持续高热推荐，暨南大学在计算机、电子、自动化等方向均有招生，专业热度对位次有上推作用；河北省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 60.98 万，较 2025 年（约 60.68 万）略有增加，物理类考生估算约 36.5 万，竞争基数扩大；暨南大学位于广东广州，属华南地区热门高校，对华北考生有一定跨省吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续大幅后移趋势、2026 年物理类扩招 10.8% 加剧竞争、相关工科专业社会热度持续高企、以及本省考生总数小幅增加等多重因素，预计 2026 年物理类最低录取位次在 2025 年基准 27073 名基础上继续后移；预测最低位次约 28872 名，区间 28372–29372 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 17508→18643→21159→24360→27073, showing a continuous backward trend. Over the past 4 years, the cumulative backward shift is about 9565 places, with the 2025 baseline at approximately 27073, and the magnitude of the backward shift increasing year by year. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 49→57→59→63→65 respectively, with a gradual small expansion each year. The 2026 plan is 72 students, an increase of 7 students (+10.8%) compared to 2025, indicating a significant expansion and further intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 59th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with recent rankings fluctuating between 47 and 59, overall at an upper-middle level. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus safety management (dormitory security checks), with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranks 41st overall, rated as 'relatively hot', with above-average attention on short video platforms, providing some positive support for application enthusiasm. Disciplines include Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Biology A-, Pharmacy A-, totaling 6 disciplines rated A- or above. Among them, Journalism and Communication, Business Administration, and Applied Economics are highly relevant to the enrollment majors, attracting applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popular major categories corresponding to Physics Category (Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering) continue to be highly recommended in 2026 due to social popularity. Jinan University offers enrollment in Computer Science, Electronics, Automation, and other directions, with major popularity exerting an upward push on rankings. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Hebei Province general college entrance examination is approximately 609,800, a slight increase from 2025 (approximately 606,800). The estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 365,000, expanding the competition base. Jinan University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, a popular university in South China, with some cross-provincial appeal to candidates in North China.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the continuous and significant backward trend of historical rankings, the 10.8% expansion of Physics Category enrollment in 2026 intensifying competition, the persistently high social popularity of related engineering majors, and a slight increase in the total number of provincial candidates, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 27073. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 28872, with a range of 28372–29372.

Rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<28372) can focus on aiming for top Tier 1 majors; rankings close to the upper limit of the range (>29372) should primarily rely on Tier 3 majors for safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category fluctuated approximately 3253→2811→3329→3619→4170, showing an overall trend of moving backward with fluctuations. In the last 3 years, it moved from 3329 to 4170, a cumulative backward shift of about 841 places. The baseline for 2025 is about 4170. The provincial History Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 29→27→27→27→35 respectively, with an expansion to 35 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 32, a reduction of 3 (-8.6%) compared to 2025, which tends to lower the ranking (making admission easier).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it is approximately 59th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 47 and 59, overall at an upper-middle level. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus safety management (dormitory security checks), with no major negative public opinion. On Douyin, its overall popularity ranks 41st, evaluated as 'relatively hot', with above-average attention on short video platforms. It has A in Journalism and Communication, A in Business Administration, A- in Applied Economics, and A- in Chinese Language and Literature, which highly match the History Category enrollment majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, Accounting, Economics, etc.), exerting strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: For History Category, the corresponding popular major categories (Law, Chinese Language/Literature, Accounting/Finance/Auditing) in 2026 show a social trend of divergence to recommendation: Law is relatively hot but competitive, Chinese Language and Literature is recommended and warming up. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the general college entrance examination in Hebei Province is about 609,800, with History Category candidates estimated at about 245,000, a slight increase from 2025 (243,700). Jinan University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, a popular comprehensive university in South China, with some cross-provincial appeal to candidates in North China.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical trend of ranking fluctuations and backward movement, the 8.6% reduction in History Category enrollment in 2026 (which lowers the ranking), the slight increase in the total number of History Category candidates in the province, and the appeal of advantageous disciplines (Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A) for applications, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly move forward from the 2025 baseline of 4170. The predicted minimum ranking is about 3986, with a range of 3486–4486.
